hooks.command: echo 'Claude Code is about to read a file. Please review the file content and ensure it does not contain sensitive information.'
if [[ "$CLU_TOOL_ARGS" =~ "git commit" ]]; then npx prettier --write "**/*.md"; fi
echo 'Claude Code has finished reading a file. Please review the file content that was read to ensure it does not contain sensitive information.'
echo 'Claude Code has a new notification. Please review the notification content to ensure it does not contain sensitive information.'
